items.question: Colab vs local Jupyter — when do you choose Colab?
items.answer: Choose Colab for zero-setup prototyping, free GPU/TPU access, and easy sharing. Choose local Jupyter when you need persistent storage, full environment control, or long-running jobs without idle timeouts.

items.question: Why do your installed packages disappear in a new Colab session?
items.answer: Because the runtime is an ephemeral VM; when it disconnects, the filesystem (including pip-installed packages) is reset, so each session starts fresh.

items.question: What breaks if you save model checkpoints only to /content?
items.answer: They're lost when the runtime disconnects. Persist them to mounted Google Drive (or download them) instead.
